controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the principle of single mode of presence
controls.control_description:
The foreign banks have to choose one of the above two modes of
presence and shall be governed by the principle of single mode of presence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the principle of single mode of presence

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry on banking business in india only through a wholly owned subsidiary
controls.control_description:
Branch mode or wholly owned subsidiary
(1) All foreign banks which are not carrying on banking business in India and which
wish to do so in the future and to whom the matters referred to in paragraph 3
apply shall carry on banking business in India only through a wholly owned
subsidiary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry on banking business in india only through a wholly owned subsidiary

controls.control_objective: To ensure convert their branches into wos
controls.control_description:
If they choose to carry
on banking business through the branch mode, and in case at a later date they
come within the purview of paragraph 3, they shall convert their branches into
WOS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convert their branches into wos

controls.control_objective: To ensure convert their branches into a wholly owned subsidiary if the matters specified in paragraph 3 apply to them
controls.control_description:
Accordingly,
such banks shall convert their branches into a wholly owned subsidiary if the
matters specified in paragraph 3 apply to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convert their branches into a wholly owned subsidiary if the matters specified in paragraph 3 apply to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option either to continue their banking business through the branch mode or to convert those branches into a wholly owned subsidiary
controls.control_description:
(4) Foreign banks which commenced banking business in India before August
2010 shall have the option either to continue their banking business through the
branch mode or to convert those branches into a wholly owned subsidiary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option either to continue their banking business through the branch mode or to convert those branches into a wholly owned subsidiary

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be in accordance with a scheme mandated in the public interest to be approved by rbi under section 44a of the banking regulation act 1949 and whi
controls.control_description:
(6) In respect of foreign banks which are presently carrying on banking business in
India, and which are required to convert their branches into a wholly owned
subsidiary or opt to do so, the conversion shall only be in accordance with a
scheme mandated in the public interest to be approved by RBI under Section
44A of the Banking Regulation Act 1949 and which is in accordance with the
conditions specified in paragraph 19.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be in accordance with a scheme mandated in the public interest to be approved by rbi under section 44a of the banking regulation act 1949 and whi

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the approval of the home country regulator/supervisor
controls.control_description:
Eligibility for setting up a wholly owned subsidiary
(1) Setting up of WOS by a foreign bank in India should have the approval of the
home country regulator/supervisor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the approval of the home country regulator/supervisor

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy rbi that it is subject to adequate prudential supervision as per internationally accepted standards, which includes consolidated supervision i
controls.control_description:
(2) A foreign bank applying for setting up a WOS in India must satisfy RBI that it is
subject to adequate prudential supervision as per internationally accepted
standards, which includes consolidated supervision in its home country.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy rbi that it is subject to adequate prudential supervision as per internationally accepted standards, which includes consolidated supervision i

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry on banking business in india only through a wholly owned subsidiary
controls.control_description:
Conditions requiring presence as WOS only
(1) Foreign banks which have commenced banking business in India after August
2010 or foreign banks which are not at present carrying on banking business in
India but wish to do so in the future shall carry on banking business in India
only through a wholly owned subsidiary, if any of the matters as described
hereunder are applicable:
Explanation: A foreign bank operating under branch mode of presence in India would
be considered to be systematically important once its assets in Indian books (on
balance sheet and credit equivalent of off-balance sheet items) become 0.25 per cent
of the total assets (inclusive of credit equivalent of off-balance sheet items) of all
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry on banking business in india only through a wholly owned subsidiary

controls.control_objective: To ensure arise if the foreign banks, i
controls.control_description:
From financial stability
perspective downside risk may arise if the foreign banks, i.e., WOSs of the
foreign banks and foreign bank branches together come to dominate the
domestic financial system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arise if the foreign banks, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be denied when the maximum share of assets in india both on and off-balance sheet of foreign banks' branches to total assets both on and off- balance
controls.control_description:
As regards foreign banks in branch mode of presence, as per
the WTO commitments licences for new foreign banks may be denied when the
maximum share of assets in India both on and off-balance sheet of foreign
banks' branches to total assets both on and off- balance sheet of the banking
system exceeds 15 per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be denied when the maximum share of assets in india both on and off-balance sheet of foreign banks' branches to total assets both on and off- balance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹500 crore
controls.control_description:
Minimum capital requirement
(1) The initial minimum paid-up voting equity capital for a WOS shall be ₹500 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ₹500 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure be funded by free foreign exchange remittance from its parent
controls.control_description:
(2) The newly set up WOS of the foreign bank would be required to bring in the
entire amount of initial capital upfront, which should be funded by free foreign
exchange remittance from its parent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be funded by free foreign exchange remittance from its parent

controls.control_objective: To ensure to convert into a wos: <image> explanation: the elements and eligibility criteria of regulatory capital instruments for existing foreign bank branches
controls.control_description:
(3) In the case of an existing foreign bank having branch presence in India, which
desires or is required to convert into a WOS:
<image>
Explanation: The elements and eligibility criteria of regulatory capital
instruments for existing foreign bank branches are different from those
applicable to domestic banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to convert into a wos: <image> explanation: the elements and eligibility criteria of regulatory capital instruments for existing foreign bank branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in computation of net worth
controls.control_description:
No general or specific provisions should be included in computation of
net worth.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in computation of net worth

controls.control_objective: To ensure convert its branch capital into the capital of wos
controls.control_description: (i) It should convert its branch capital into the capital of WOS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convert its branch capital into the capital of wos

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for the core management functions which cannot be outsourced including to group entities whether in india or abroad as laid down in res
controls.control_description:
Use of group resources
(1) The WOS shall be responsible for the core management functions which cannot
be outsourced including to Group entities whether in India or abroad as laid
down in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Managing Risks in
Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for the core management functions which cannot be outsourced including to group entities whether in india or abroad as laid down in res

controls.control_objective: To ensure consist of persons as defined under section 10a of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
Corporate governance: The composition of the board of directors of WOS should
meet the following requirements:
(1) not less than 51 percent of the total number of members of the board of
directors shall consist of persons as defined under Section 10A of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consist of persons as defined under section 10a of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure be non-executive directors
controls.control_description: (2) not less than two-third of the directors should be non-executive directors;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be non-executive directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be independent of the management of the subsidiary in india, its parent and any subsidiary or other associate of the foreign bank parent
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be independent of the management of the subsidiary in india, its parent and any subsidiary or other associate of the foreign bank parent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indian nationals/nris/pios subject to the condition that one-third of the directors are indian nationals resident in india
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indian nationals/nris/pios subject to the condition that one-third of the directors are indian nationals resident in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained in terms of section 10b(1a) of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained in terms of section 10b(1a) of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained in terms of section 35b of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained in terms of section 35b of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable to woss
controls.control_description:
(8) The Guidelines on Compensation of Whole Time Directors /Chief Executive
Officers, as applicable to private sector banks in India, under Reserve Bank
of India (Commercial Banks - Governance) Directions, 2025, shall also be
applicable to WOSs;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable to woss

controls.control_objective: To ensure be resident in india
controls.control_description: (9) The CEO will be appointed on full time basis and should be resident in India;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be resident in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure conform to the 'fit and proper' criteria as laid down in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - governance) directions, 2025, as amended from time
controls.control_description:
<image>
(10) The directors should conform to the 'Fit and Proper' criteria as laid down in
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Governance) Directions, 2025,
as amended from time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conform to the 'fit and proper' criteria as laid down in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - governance) directions, 2025, as amended from time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the provisions of the companies act, 2013, banking regulation act, 1949, reserve bank of india act, 1934, foreign exchange management a
controls.control_description:
Statutory, regulatory, prudential and other requirements
(1) The WOS shall be governed by the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013,
Banking Regulation Act, 1949, Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, Foreign
Exchange Management Act, 1999, Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007
and other relevant statutes, directives, prudential regulations and other
guidelines/instructions issued by RBI and other regulators from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the provisions of the companies act, 2013, banking regulation act, 1949, reserve bank of india act, 1934, foreign exchange management a

controls.control_objective: To ensure raise rupee resources through issue of non-equity capital instruments, as allowed to domestic banks
controls.control_description:
Raising of Non-equity capital in India
(1) WOS of foreign banks may raise rupee resources through issue of non-equity
capital instruments, as allowed to domestic banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to raise rupee resources through issue of non-equity capital instruments, as allowed to domestic banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the priority sector lending requirements, as applicable to domestic commercial banks/ wos of foreign banks under master directions - reser
controls.control_description:
Priority sector lending requirements for WOS
(1) The WOSs shall comply with the priority sector lending requirements, as
applicable to Domestic Commercial Banks/ WoS of Foreign banks under
Master Directions - Reserve Bank of India (Priority Sector Lending - Targets
and Classification) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the priority sector lending requirements, as applicable to domestic commercial banks/ wos of foreign banks under master directions - reser

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide counter guarantee to its parent for such support
controls.control_description:
However, WOS should not provide counter
guarantee to its parent for such support.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide counter guarantee to its parent for such support

controls.control_objective: To ensure declare dividend like domestic banks subject to criteria laid down in 1[reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudential norms on declaration of d
controls.control_description:
Declaration of dividends
(1) The WOS of a foreign bank, being a company incorporated in India, may
declare dividend like domestic banks subject to criteria laid down in 1[Reserve
Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Declaration of
Dividends and Remittance of Profit) Directions, 2026] which may be repatriated
as per the provisions of FEMA 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to declare dividend like domestic banks subject to criteria laid down in 1[reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudential norms on declaration of d

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain arm's length relationship with parent's group entities
controls.control_description: (2) The WOS shall maintain arm's length relationship with parent's group entities;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain arm's length relationship with parent's group entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at their option dilute their stake to 74 per cent or less in accordance with the extant fdi policy on foreign investment in banking sector and list
controls.control_description:
Dilution of WOS to 74 per cent
(1) WOS of foreign banks may, at their option dilute their stake to 74 per cent or
less in accordance with the extant FDI policy on foreign investment in banking
sector and list on stock exchanges in India.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , at their option dilute their stake to 74 per cent or less in accordance with the extant fdi policy on foreign investment in banking sector and list

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted
controls.control_description:
Mergers / Acquisitions
(1) After a review is made with regard to the extent of penetration of foreign
investment in Indian banks and functioning of foreign banks (branch mode and
WOSs), WOSs may be permitted, subject to regulatory approvals and such
conditions as may be prescribed, to enter into mergers and acquisition
transactions with any private sector bank in India subject to the overall foreign
investment limit of 74 per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be realistic and viable
controls.control_description: (2) The business model submitted by the applicant should be realistic and viable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be realistic and viable

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider restricting the bank's expansion and imposing other penal measures as may be necessary
controls.control_description:
In case of deviation from the stated business plan after issue of licence, RBI
may consider restricting the bank's expansion and imposing other penal
measures as may be necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider restricting the bank's expansion and imposing other penal measures as may be necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure make full use of modern infrastructural facilities in office equipment, computers, telecommunications etc
controls.control_description:
(3) The WOS shall make full use of modern infrastructural facilities in office
equipment, computers, telecommunications etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make full use of modern infrastructural facilities in office equipment, computers, telecommunications etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a high powered customer grievances cell to handle customer complaints
controls.control_description:
It should have a high powered Customer
Grievances Cell to handle customer complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a high powered customer grievances cell to handle customer complaints

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to comply with the provisions of that act, to the extent they are applicable to banking companies as defined in banking regulation act, 19
controls.control_description:
(5) A foreign bank, which obtains an in-principle approval from the Reserve Bank
for opening a WOS in India has to apply to the Registrar of Companies for
registering the subsidiary as a company under the Companies Act, 2013 (Act 1
of 2013) and shall be required to comply with the provisions of that Act, to the
extent they are applicable to banking companies as defined in Banking
Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to comply with the provisions of that act, to the extent they are applicable to banking companies as defined in banking regulation act, 19

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the reserve bank for issuance of a license in its name under section 22 of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
(6) On completion of the formalities relating to the registration as a company under
the Companies Act, 2013 and compliance of the conditions stipulated in these
guidelines, the new banking company (WOS) shall approach the Reserve Bank
for issuance of a license in its name under Section 22 of the Banking Regulation
Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the reserve bank for issuance of a license in its name under section 22 of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed necessary, from time to time
controls.control_description:
(7) RBI reserves the right to add or amend any of the clauses/conditions in the
above guidelines, as may be deemed necessary, from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed necessary, from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be amalgamated with its wos pursuant to the directions hereby issued by rbi in the public interest under section 35a read with section 44a of the bank
controls.control_description:
Procedure for conversion of existing branches of foreign banks into WOS
(1) The undertaking of the foreign bank in India consisting of all its branches shall
be amalgamated with its WOS pursuant to the directions hereby issued by RBI
in the public interest under Section 35A read with Section 44A of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amalgamated with its wos pursuant to the directions hereby issued by rbi in the public interest under section 35a read with section 44a of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an application in form iii prescribed vide rule 11(a) of the banking regulation (companies) rules, 1949 to the reserve bank for setting up of a w
controls.control_description:
(2) A foreign bank intending to convert its branch/branches in India into WOS shall
make an application in Form III prescribed vide Rule 11(a) of the Banking
Regulation (Companies) Rules, 1949 to the Reserve Bank for setting up of a
wholly owned subsidiary (WOS);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an application in form iii prescribed vide rule 11(a) of the banking regulation (companies) rules, 1949 to the reserve bank for setting up of a w

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach reserve bank for issuance of a fresh license in its name under section 22 of the b
controls.control_description:
<image>
(4) On completion of the formalities relating to registration as a company under
the Companies Act, 2013 (Act 1 of 2013) as stipulated in paragraphs 18 (5) &
(6) of this Scheme, the new banking company (WOS) shall approach Reserve
Bank for issuance of a fresh license in its name under Section 22 of the B.R.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach reserve bank for issuance of a fresh license in its name under section 22 of the b

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare a draft amalgamation scheme and get it approved by the shareholders of the bank by passing a resolution as required under section 44a of the b
controls.control_description:
(5) Once Reserve Bank grants licence to new banking company (WOS), the
foreign bank concerned shall prepare a draft amalgamation scheme and get
it approved by the shareholders of the bank by passing a resolution as
required under Section 44A of the B.R.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare a draft amalgamation scheme and get it approved by the shareholders of the bank by passing a resolution as required under section 44a of the b

controls.control_objective: To ensure also approve the draft amalgamation scheme by passing a resolution as required under section 44a of the b
controls.control_description:
(6) The shareholders of the Indian subsidiary (WOS) shall also approve the draft
amalgamation scheme by passing a resolution as required under Section 44A
of the B.R.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also approve the draft amalgamation scheme by passing a resolution as required under section 44a of the b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, with wos of the foreign bank subject to compliance with the provisions contained in section 44a of b r act, 1949
controls.control_description:
(8) Reserve Bank will sanction the scheme of amalgamation of branch or
branches, as the case may be, with WOS of the foreign bank subject to
compliance with the provisions contained in Section 44A of B R Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, with wos of the foreign bank subject to compliance with the provisions contained in section 44a of b r act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure take effect from such date, and subject to such conditions, as may be specified by reserve bank in its order
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take effect from such date, and subject to such conditions, as may be specified by reserve bank in its order

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to, and vest in, new banking company i
controls.control_description:
(9) On such date as Reserve Bank may, by order, appoint, the undertakings of
branch or branches of foreign bank shall be transferred to, and vest in, new
banking company i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred to, and vest in, new banking company i

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue and allot shares either to the entity whose branches are being amalgamated or to the holding company of that entity
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue and allot shares either to the entity whose branches are being amalgamated or to the holding company of that entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, of the foreign bank, which applies for conversion into wos, can continue to do its usual business in india in the <image> same name and in the sam
controls.control_description:
(12) Branch or branches as the case may be, of the foreign bank, which applies for
conversion into WOS, can continue to do its usual business in India in the
<image>
same name and in the same manner, and subject to such conditions as the
Reserve Bank may prescribe, till the appointed day;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, of the foreign bank, which applies for conversion into wos, can continue to do its usual business in india in the <image> same name and in the sam

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, of the foreign bank under section 22 and 23 of b
controls.control_description:
Act, 1949 the licence/licences granted to branch or branches,
as the case may be, of the foreign bank under Section 22 and 23 of B.R.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, of the foreign bank under section 22 and 23 of b

controls.control_objective: To ensure stand cancelled
controls.control_description:
Act
1949, shall stand cancelled;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to stand cancelled

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify as a licensing condition that licence is given only for the purpose of amalgamation of existing branches of the concerned bank and for functio
controls.control_description:
(14) While granting licence to new banking company (WOS), RBI shall specify as
a licensing condition that licence is given only for the purpose of amalgamation
of existing branches of the concerned bank and for functioning as a full-
fledged subsidiary and in case there is failure on the part of the banking
company to complete the process of amalgamation within a period of six
months or such period as allowed by RBI, the licence shall be cancelled.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify as a licensing condition that licence is given only for the purpose of amalgamation of existing branches of the concerned bank and for functio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through pravaah
controls.control_description:
Application procedure
(1) Application, in Form III prescribed vide Rule 11(a) of the Banking Regulation
(Companies) Rules, 1949 together with the additional information as may be
required for setting up of WOS by foreign banks shall be through PRAVAAH.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure be addressed to: chief general manager, reserve bank of india, department of regulation, central office building, shahid bhagat singh marg, mumbai - 4
controls.control_description:
(2) Applications along with other details, as mentioned above, should be addressed
to:
Chief General Manager, Reserve Bank of India, Department of Regulation, Central Office Building, Shahid Bhagat Singh Marg, Mumbai - 400 001.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be addressed to: chief general manager, reserve bank of india, department of regulation, central office building, shahid bhagat singh marg, mumbai - 4
